attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
CAST(SORCTL.DESCRIPTION	AS VARCHAR(240))	FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
SORCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID  =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT)	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
'OOD'		SS_CODE   ,                    
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE,
USER,
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                      
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE ='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
EORCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
EORCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
'OOD'		SS_CODE   ,                    
EORCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE     ,  
USER,
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                     
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
WHERE EORCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'


UNION ALL

/* OOD FUSN CODE*/
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID  =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
'OOD'		SS_CODE   ,                    
SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE,
USER,
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                      
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE ='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT
SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
EOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION		FREIGHT_LINE_DESCRIPTION    ,  
EOFRCTL.UOM_CODE			UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE     ,     
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END	RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT ,      
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN EOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NULL END		RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT,      
SMATL_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY		BK_ITEM_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,     
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
SMAT.AR_TRX_KEY			RU_AR_TRX_KEY ,                
CASE WHEN SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =-9999 THEN 'LINE LEVEL'  ELSE 'TRX LEVEL' END FREIGHT_LINE_TYPE,           
CASE WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN NAAT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN 'DEBIT' ELSE NULL END FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE,
EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT , 
'OOD'		SS_CODE   ,                    
EOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE		ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'I'	DML_TYPE     ,  
USER,
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                     
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EOFRCTL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL
	ON (SMATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON (SMATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT 
	ON ( NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE	SMATL_1
	ON (SMATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SMATL_1.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX  SMAT
	ON (SMAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = EOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
	AND SMAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
WHERE EOFRCTL.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

SELECT 
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ORG_ID,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCTL.REASON_CODE,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SORCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SORCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
SORCTL.UOM_CODE,
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCTL.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE ='FREIGHT' 
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ))
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXORCTL
WHERE EXORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)

SELECT SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
,SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE15                   
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3                    
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4                    
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION                   
,SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER           
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID                
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8     
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        
,SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID             
,SOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER                   
,SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE                     
,SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      
,SOFRCTL.ORG_ID                        
,SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED             
,SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
,SOFRCTL.REASON_CODE                   
,SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE               
,SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE                      
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           
,SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
,SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE                      
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE2                    
,SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     
,SOFRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,SOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOFRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOFRCTL.RULE_END_DATE                 
,SOFRCTL.SPLIT_KEY                     
,SOFRCTL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOFRCTL.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL,
(SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE GLOBAL_NAME= 'OOD') NSSC
WHERE SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE ='FREIGHT' 
AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT '1' FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL,  
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NAAT,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NATL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NATL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
AND NAAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND  SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_1
   WHERE SATL_1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND  SATL_1.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ))
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXOFRCTL
WHERE EXOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
